case_title: DISCOVERY BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD VS. JOSUE LUIS HURTADO et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVERY BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HURTADO, JOSUE LUIS $6,070.49 PRINCIPAL, $240.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,310.49, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVERY BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD SERVED DEC-14-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HURTADO, JOSUE LUIS

SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: WINN, BRIAN N SUBSTITUTED FOR JACOBS, KURTISS A AS ATTORNEY FOR DISCOVERY BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVERY BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD AS TO DEFENDANT HURTADO, JOSUE LUIS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-02-2009
